channel.title: SpotPulse Trending
channel.description: Live web pulse — India & Global intelligence dashboard.

item.title: Signal adds security warnings for social engineering, phishing attacks
item.description: Signal has introduced new in-app confirmations and warning messages as additional safeguards against phishing and social engineering attempts that could lead to various forms of fraud. [...]

item.title: AI Just Built Its First Real Zero-Day Hack — Google Sounds Alarm - Dallas Express
item.description: AI Just Built Its First Real Zero-Day Hack — Google Sounds Alarm Dallas Express

item.title: Traders will soon be able to bet on computer chip prices as AI drives costs skyward
item.description: Contracts can be used to hedge against rising GPU rental rates and other operational costs

item.title: AI-Driven Cyber Threats Are Growing, Google Warns - CircleID
item.description: AI-Driven Cyber Threats Are Growing, Google Warns CircleID

item.title: Farooq joins liquor debate, says even Sheikh Abdullah didn’t favour prohibition; Mirwaiz, BJP seek ban
item.description: National Conference president Farooq Abdullah weighed in on a liquor ban debate in Jammu and Kashmir, citing his father's 1977 stance that revenue generation was key. He argued that prohibition wouldn't stop consumption, as people would source alcohol from outside. Abdullah also questioned critics' silence when liquor shops previously opened across the region.

item.title: "Our Appeal To Prime Minister Is...": What Khan Sir Said On NEET Paper Leak
item.description: Khan Sir said the NTA has failed in its administrative responsibility for high-stakes exams.

item.title: Terrorist killed, Poonch infiltration bid foiled
item.description: Army troops foiled an infiltration attempt in Poonch's Krishna Ghati sector on Tuesday, neutralizing one terrorist approximately 300 meters inside the Indian side of the Line of Control. This incident follows several other thwarted infiltration bids in the Jammu region in recent months, highlighting ongoing vigilance along the LoC.

item.title: All Energy Solar awarded Gold for best Solar Power Provider in the Twin Cities. - PR Newswire
item.description: All Energy Solar awarded Gold for best Solar Power Provider in the Twin Cities. PR Newswire

item.title: Natural Gas, WTI Oil, Brent Oil Forecasts – Oil Gains 4% As Traders See No Progress In U.S. – Iran Talks - FXEmpire
item.description: Natural Gas, WTI Oil, Brent Oil Forecasts – Oil Gains 4% As Traders See No Progress In U.S. – Iran Talks FXEmpire

item.title: Retail inflation up a tad on rise in food, bullion prices
item.description: Retail inflation reached a four-month peak of 3.5% in April. This rise was fueled by increasing food and gold/silver prices. Economists anticipate further inflationary pressures ahead. The Reserve Bank of India is expected to maintain its current policy rate. Inflation is nearing the RBI's target, suggesting a pause in rate hikes for now.

item.title: CEA Nageswaran says West Asia crisis a balance of payments stress test; to impact CAD, inflation & exchange rate
item.description: Large companies must pay micro and small enterprises on time. This eases their working capital and reduces funding costs. Managing the current account, financing it, and preventing currency depreciation are key macroeconomic goals for FY27. The West Asia crisis presents a balance of payments stress test.

item.title: 50 paise a kg: Onion price crash leaves Maharashtra farmers in throes of debt
Replit Showcases AI-Driven Software Development Themes at SaaStr Annual 2026 - TipRanks
item.description: Replit Showcases AI-Driven Software Development Themes at SaaStr Annual 2026 TipRanks

item.title: US inflation jumps to 3.8% as energy costs surge from Iran war
item.description: The key measure of US inflation rises its highest level since May 2023 as consumers feel the impact of the Iran war.

item.title: Senate confirms Kevin Warsh as Fed governor, clears way for chair vote
item.description: The upper chamber voted to approve Warsh's nomination by a 51-45 vote, on a mostly party-line basis.

item.title: BREAKING: U.S. President Donald Trump Makes Important Statements – “The Ukraine-Russia War Will End Soon” - Cryptonews.net
item.description: BREAKING: U.S. President Donald Trump Makes Important Statements – “The Ukraine-Russia War Will End Soon” Cryptonews.net

item.title: Breaking News: U.S. inflation shot up to a 3.8% annual rate in April, as the war in Iran raised energy prices and costs across the country. - facebook.com
item.description: Breaking News: U.S. inflation shot up to a 3.8% annual rate in April, as the war in Iran raised energy prices and costs across the country. facebook.com

item.title: Fortinet warns of critical RCE flaws in FortiSandbox and FortiAuthenticator
item.description: Fortinet has released security patches for two critical vulnerabilities in FortiSandbox and FortiAuthenticator that could enable attackers to run commands or arbitrary code. [...]

item.title: US Power Prices Climb 61% Faster Than Inflation as Demand Surges
item.description: Consumer prices climbed last month by the most in three years, but prices for electricity surged even more, highlighting an intensifying battle between utilities, consumers and power grids.

item.title: 6 Devotees Killed, 14 Injured After Temple Wall Collapses In Maharashtra
item.description: Police said a large number of devotees usually visit the temple on Tuesdays.

item.title: Top BJP leader's aide shot dead in violence after Indian state election - AOL.com
item.description: Top BJP leader's aide shot dead in violence after Indian state election AOL.com

item.title: US LNG Pioneer Charif Souki Vows He Will Never Go Public Again
item.description: Natural gas entrepreneur Charif Souki’s latest venture will remain closely held after his previous two companies pursued public offerings.

item.title: 'Shock Is Coming': Uday Kotak Backs PM, Issues Warning Over Iran War
item.description: Kotak said the impact of the conflict on energy prices is yet to fully reach consumers.

item.title: Trump doesn't need Congress to restart Iran strikes: Hegseth
item.description: The Iran war, now well into its third month, has caused oil prices to soar globally as Iran continues to lock down the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Samsung Elec, labour union fail to reach pay deal as strike looms - Reuters
item.description: Samsung Elec, labour union fail to reach pay deal as strike looms Reuters

item.title: Microsoft Has Recouped More Than Double Its $13 Billion OpenAI Investment in Revenue
item.description: For three years, Microsoft was the only cloud provider to sell OpenAI’s large language models to other businesses, an exclusive right it fought hard to preserve after investing $13 billion in the startup. But businesses bought more access to those models from OpenAI directly than from Microsoft over that time, new data show. Even so, Microsoft’s OpenAI bet has paid off handsomely in other ways. Microsoft has already

item.title: Dali ship operator charged over deadly Baltimore bridge collapse
item.description: Six construction workers were killed and several vehicles plunged into the river after the cargo ship crashed into the bridge.

item.title: India Books Phosphate Fertilizer at 40% Above Pre-War Prices
item.description: India, the world’s top buyer of diammonium phosphate, has contracted the crop nutrient at prices almost 40% higher than pre-war levels as the Middle East conflict disrupts supplies and pushes global benchmarks higher.

item.title: US FDA Commissioner Marty Makary resigns amid turmoil in federal health agencies: Details here
item.description: The US Food and Drug Administration (FDA) commissioner Marty Makary on Tuesday (local time) resigned from his position, marking the fourth high-profile exit of a member from President Donald Trump's administration this year

item.title: Serbia hosts first joint military exercise with NATO
item.description: The two-week-long drills come less than 30 years after NATO bombed Belgrade in the Kosovo war.

item.title: France’s Economy Is Succumbing to Iran War Shock, Survey Shows
item.description: France’s economy is showing signs of faltering as the fallout from the Middle East conflict hits growth and ratchets up inflation pressure, according to the central bank’s monthly survey of companies.

item.title: No sign of larger hantavirus outbreak, says UN health agency
item.description: The situation could still change and there might be more confirmed cases, warns the head of the World Health Organization.

item.title: PM Modi must call all-party meet to discuss impact of West Asia conflict: Pawar
item.description: Pawar demanded that the PM convene an all-party meeting under his own chairmanship

item.title: India-Oman FTA on track for June 1 start even as deal with Chile hits hurdles, says Commerce Minister
item.description: The India-Oman Comprehensive Economic Partnership Agreement was signed in December 2025

item.title: Israel sent Iron Dome anti-missile batteries and personnel to UAE: US envoy
item.description: Mike Huckabee calls on Gulf states to 'pick a side' in the war between Israel and Iran as he heaps praise on Abu Dhabi.

item.title: Breaking down the inflation report: Consumers are being hit by Trump’s war - The Boston Globe
item.description: Breaking down the inflation report: Consumers are being hit by Trump’s war The Boston Globe

item.title: Iran’s Kharg Island Oil Shipments Show First Prolonged Halt Since Start of War
item.description: Oil shipments from Iran’s main export terminal appear to have come to a standstill over the past several days, according to satellite images, the first sign of a prolonged halt since the start of the war.

item.title: Infiltrator killed by Army near the LoC in Poonch
item.description: An Army spokesman said soldiers detected “suspicious movement around 300 metres inside own territory in the general area of Krishna Ghati sector along the LoC at around 4 p.m.”

item.title: Analysis: Iran war hangs over Trump's China trip — and his presidency
item.description: There is no quick fix to the economic and political damage from the war.

item.title: Oil Shock From Iran War Drives US Consumer Inflation To 3-Year High
item.description: US consumers have been battered by years of higher-than-expected inflation.
